'''dashuzhu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:mkeka|mkeka]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| d-sh-zh
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:mkeka|mkeka]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| dashuzhu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:dæshizhith|dæshizhith]] || [[word:dæshizhij|dæshizhij]] || [[word:dæshizhish|dæshizhish]] || [[word:dæshizhi|dæshizhi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:dashushuzhuth|dashushuzhuth]] || [[word:dashushuzhuj|dashushuzhuj]] || [[word:dashushuzhush|dashushuzhush]] || [[word:dashushuzhu|dashushuzhu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:dashuzhuth|dashuzhuth]] || [[word:dashuzhuj|dashuzhuj]] || [[word:dashuzhush|dashuzhush]] || [[word:dashuzhu|dashuzhu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:dashufzhuth|dashufzhuth]] || [[word:dashufzhuj|dashufzhuj]] || [[word:dashufzhush|dashufzhush]] || [[word:dashufzhuf|dashufzhuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:dashuzhuthu|dashuzhuthu]] || [[word:dashuzhuju|dashuzhuju]] || [[word:dashuzhushu|dashuzhushu]] || [[word:dashuzhuku|dashuzhuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:dashuzhuth|dashuzhuth]] || [[word:dashuzhuj|dashuzhuj]] || [[word:dashuzhush|dashuzhush]] || [[word:dashuzhu|dashuzhu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:dashuzhuthul|dashuzhuthul]] || [[word:dashuzhujul|dashuzhujul]] || [[word:dashuzhushul|dashuzhushul]] || [[word:dashuzhukul|dashuzhukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:dashuzhuthuthu|dashuzhuthuthu]] || [[word:dashuzhujuju|dashuzhujuju]] || [[word:dashuzhushushu|dashuzhushushu]] || [[word:dashuzhuku|dashuzhuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:dashuzhuthun|dashuzhuthun]] || [[word:dashuzhujun|dashuzhujun]] || [[word:dashuzhushun|dashuzhushun]] || [[word:dashuzhukun|dashuzhukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:dashuzhuthuoro|dashuzhuthuoro]] || [[word:dashuzhujuoro|dashuzhujuoro]] || [[word:dashuzhushuoro|dashuzhushuoro]] || [[word:dashuzhukuoro|dashuzhukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|5390c6a}}
